BreakEvenAnalysis.Context: Quick back-of-napkin on the studio monthly costs ahead of the family budget review.

CurrentState.Note: Rough estimate only. Need to revisit with budget once 2025 actuals are closed.

Scenario_A_RentTo750.Label: Studio room cost rises to $750/mo if utilities pass through
Scenario_A_RentTo750.BreakEvenCalculation: Fixed costs $2,670 + $100 increase = $2,770. At $95/student, $2,770 / $95 = 29.2 → 30 students minimum.
Scenario_A_RentTo750.Impact: Minimal. Well within buffer at 55 students.

Scenario_B_RentTo850.Label: Worst case studio cost to $850/mo (unlikely)
Scenario_B_RentTo850.Impact: Still fine. the studio said this was unlikely but wanted to stress test.

BreakEvenAnalysis.KeyInsight: Break-even is ~28-30 students at current cost structure. At 55 students we have plenty of headroom. Main concern was seasonal dip but even at 48 (Dec low) we're safe.
ActionItems: Wait to confirm the utilities situation
Revisit after year-end with budget for proper modeling
